title: rubus × litigans
intro: Rubus × litigans, also known as a hybrid between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the red raspberry (Rubus idaeus), is a deciduous shrub native to North America. The medicinal properties of Rubus × litigans include its high antioxidant content and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × litigans include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving cognitive function, and supporting digestive health. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as jams, jellies, and teas, and can also be consumed as a frozen or fresh fruit, offering its nutritional benefits to those who consume it.
